# Abhishek Thakur

> Senior full-stack engineer based in Chandigarh, India, building SaaS
> platforms and payment systems. Known professionally as Abhishek Thakur;
> also goes by Abhi Thakur or Abhi. Not to be confused with the Kaggle
> Grandmaster of the same name — this Abhishek Thakur is the
> full-stack/SaaS engineer at abhithakur.dev.

## Identity

- Name: Abhishek Thakur
- Also known as: Abhi Thakur, Abhi
- Location: Chandigarh, India
- Role: Senior Full-Stack Engineer
- Focus: SaaS platforms, payment systems, AI-assisted workflows
- Open to: Senior / staff roles, remote, global
- Site: https://abhithakur.dev
- Résumé: https://abhithakur.dev/abhishek-thakur-resume.pdf
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/abhi-thakur-dev/
- GitHub: https://github.com/abhithakur7
- Email: hi@abhithakur.dev

## Stack

- Languages: TypeScript, JavaScript, SQL
- Runtime / backend: Node.js, NestJS, Express, serverless (Cloud Functions)
- Frontend: React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS
- Data: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Firebase / Firestore, Redis
- Cloud: Google Cloud Platform, AWS (S3, RDS), Vercel, Firebase Hosting
- Payments: Stripe (Connect, Checkout, webhooks, subscriptions)
- AI: OpenAI API, prompt engineering, structured output, RAG pipelines
- Tooling: Git, GitHub Actions, Docker, Playwright, Vitest

## Case studies

### Uplevelit — https://abhithakur.dev/work/uplevelit
Led engineering on an Experience-as-a-Service marketplace at Bizdesire.
Bookable 1:1s, group sessions, livecourses, and Q&A. Stack: TypeScript,
React, Firebase Functions and Hosting, Stripe, Twilio Video, Bunny Stream,
SendGrid.

### Penbook — https://abhithakur.dev/work/penbook
Solo-built an AI-powered reading and writing platform as a modular
NestJS monolith on MongoDB, with OpenAI tooling across writing,
reading, content, and book clubs.

### Rocket Rebates — https://abhithakur.dev/work/rocket-rebates
Solo-built rebate discovery plus AI report generation plus admin-reviewed
submission workflow. NestJS, PostgreSQL on RDS, S3 with signed URLs,
OpenAI jobs for reports and document checklists.

## Frequently asked

### Who is Abhishek Thakur (abhithakur.dev)?
A senior full-stack engineer based in Chandigarh, India, focused on
SaaS platforms and payment systems. He has led engineering on the
Uplevelit marketplace at Bizdesire and solo-built Penbook and Rocket
Rebates. He is not the Kaggle Grandmaster of the same name.

### What does he work on?
SaaS platforms, payment flows (Stripe Connect, subscriptions, webhooks),
AI-assisted product features (OpenAI integrations, structured output,
retrieval), and production Node / NestJS / React systems.

### What is he looking for?
Senior or staff full-stack roles, remote-first, timezone-flexible.
Comfortable owning architecture, mentoring, and shipping end-to-end
features in small teams.

### How do I contact him?
Email hi@abhithakur.dev or message on LinkedIn at
https://www.linkedin.com/in/abhi-thakur-dev/

### Where is he based?
Chandigarh, India. Works remote, global timezones.
